    I

    iconResId - Variable in class domain.Category
    Resource ID for the category icon; 0 if no icon is assigned.
    id - Variable in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Unique database identifier for this cycle.
    id - Variable in class domain.Category
    Unique database identifier for this category.
    id - Variable in class domain.Expense
    Unique database identifier for this expense.
    initComponents() - Method in class ui.BaseScreen
    Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.).
    initComponents() - Method in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.).
    initComponents() - Method in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.).
    initComponents() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.).
    initComponents() - Method in class ui.LockScreen
    Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.).
    initComponents() - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.).
    initComponents() - Method in class ui.SetupScreen
    Initialises all UI components (fields, buttons, labels, etc.).
    initFilters() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Builds and registers all category filter toggle buttons.
    initializeCycle(double, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class app.App
    Creates and activates a new budget cycle.
    initializeCycle(double, LocalDate, LocalDate) - Method in class control.CycleManager
    Creates and activates a new budget cycle, persisting it to the database.
    initializeTables() - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Creates all required tables if they do not already exist.
    initLayout() - Method in class ui.BaseScreen
    Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy.
    initLayout() - Method in class ui.DashboardScreen
    Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy.
    initLayout() - Method in class ui.ExpenseLoggingScreen
    Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy.
    initLayout() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy.
    initLayout() - Method in class ui.LockScreen
    Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy.
    initLayout() - Method in class ui.SettingsScreen
    Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy.
    initLayout() - Method in class ui.SetupScreen
    Arranges the initialised components into the BaseScreen.panel hierarchy.
    initTransactionTableModel() - Method in class ui.HistoryScreen
    Creates a non-editable table model with columns: Description, Category, Date, Amount.
    insertCategory(Category) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Inserts a new category record into the database.
    insertCategory(String) - Method in class app.App
    Creates and persists a new expense category with no icon.
    insertCategory(String, int) - Method in class control.ExpenseManager
    Creates and persists a new expense category.
    insertCycle(BudgetCycle) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Inserts a new budget cycle record into the database.
    insertExpense(Expense) - Method in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    Inserts a new expense record into the database.
    instance - Static variable in class persistence.DatabaseHelper
    The sole instance of this class (Singleton pattern).
    isActive() - Method in class domain.BudgetCycle
    Checks whether this cycle is currently active.
    isLockedOut() - Method in class control.AuthManager
    Checks whether the user is currently in a lockout period.
